#NotebookLM #BlockchainFinance #reference

## Overview
Blockchain technology is transforming financial services through decentralized ledger systems.

## Key Concepts
- Smart contracts automate financial agreements
- DeFi protocols challenge traditional banking
- Central bank digital currencies are being piloted worldwide
